title: Marketplace Org-Template Contract
description: SSOT JSON-Schema (draft 2020-12) for the Molecule marketplace org-template artifact — the publishable shape of an org-template `org.yaml` (+ per-agent `workspace.yaml`) (molecule-ai-org-template-* repos). DERIVED FROM THE REAL ARTIFACTS + their CI validator: molecule-ai-org-template-molecule-dev/org.yaml (+ community-manager/workspace.yaml), gemini-growth-team, mock-bigorg, validated by validate-org-template.py (required: name; must have at least `workspaces` or `defaults`; each workspace needs `name`; `plugins` must be a list; recurses `children`). TWO COMPOSITION STYLES are tolerated, exactly as the real templates use them: (1) INLINE — `workspaces` is a LIST of recursive workspace nodes with `children[]` (gemini-growth-team, mock-bigorg); (2) FOLDER-TREE — `org.yaml` references per-agent `workspace.yaml` files via custom YAML tags (`!include`, `!external`) that resolve at platform load time to workspace nodes (molecule-dev). Those custom tags are a YAML-load concern (validate-org-template.py parses past them) and do not appear in this JSON contract; this schema models the RESOLVED node tree. `workspaces` accepts BOTH a list AND a map (name->node) so either authoring style validates. Modelled permissively (additionalProperties:true) because org templates carry heterogeneous per-org config (category_routing, idle-loop knobs, initial prompts).

defaults.description: Org-wide defaults applied to every workspace (runtime, tier, plugins[], category_routing, idle_prompt/idle_interval_seconds, initial_prompt, ...). Per-workspace `plugins:` UNIONs with `defaults.plugins`. Modelled as an OPEN object because the contents are heterogeneous per-org; validate-org-template.py only requires that `workspaces` OR `defaults` is present.

workspaces.description: The workspace tree. Accepts BOTH a LIST of workspace nodes (inline composition — gemini-growth-team/mock-bigorg) AND a MAP of name->node. In the folder-tree style (molecule-dev) the real org.yaml lists `!include`/`!external` YAML tags that resolve to these nodes at load time.

oneOf.description: Map of workspace name -> workspace node.

workspaceNode.description: A single workspace (agent) node. Recursive via `children[]`. Fields derived from the inline nodes (gemini-growth-team) and the folder-tree workspace.yaml (molecule-dev/community-manager). `name` is the only field validate-org-template.py requires; `plugins` must be a list when present.

role.description: Free-text role description for the agent.

runtime.description: Optional per-workspace runtime override (else inherits `defaults.runtime`). Canonical hyphen form.

files_dir.description: Directory under the template repo holding this agent's files (prompts, schedules).

plugins.description: Per-workspace plugins (UNIONed with defaults.plugins). Must be a list (validate-org-template.py enforces). Bare names or source-contract strings; prefix `!`/`-` to opt a default OUT.

items.description: A plugin name or source-contract string (optionally `!`/`-` prefixed to opt out a default).

channels.description: External channel bindings (e.g. a Discord channel the agent owns).

schedules.description: Per-workspace schedule grid (same family as the workspace-template schedule shape).

initial_prompt.description: Inline prompt run once on first boot (not on restart). Keep local — no A2A sends.

initial_prompt_file.description: Path to the first-boot prompt file (alternative to inline `initial_prompt`).

idle_prompt.description: Inline idle-loop reflection prompt (self-sent while heartbeat.active_tasks == 0). Empty disables the idle loop.

idle_prompt_file.description: Path to the idle-loop prompt file (alternative to inline `idle_prompt`).

idle_interval_seconds.description: Idle-loop interval in seconds (ignored when idle prompt is empty).

canvas.description: Canvas placement coordinates for the org graph UI.

children.description: Child workspace nodes (recursive). The tree depth/fan-out is unbounded (mock-bigorg nests deeply).

runtimeId.description: Canonical runtime identifier (hyphen form). Same SSOT enum as plugin-manifest.schema.json; underscore aliases accepted.

prompt.description: Inline prompt run on the cron tick.

prompt_file.description: Path to a prompt file run on the cron tick.
